team.name: Eliano Bou Assi
team.bio:
Eliano Bou Assi is an international makeup artist, MAC Cosmetics trainer, and senior beauty educator with over 32 years of professional experience in the global beauty industry, spanning Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and India.
His journey began in 1993 in professional makeup and hair artistry for television, fashion, and celebrity productions, before evolving into a global career in luxury beauty education, artistry, and brand leadership.
Eliano spent more than two decades with Estée Lauder Companies, holding senior regional and international roles including Regional Retail Education Director – KSA, EMEA Education Director – Bobbi Brown Cosmetics, Retail Education Director – Middle East & UK (Bobbi Brown & La Mer), and Regional MAC Cosmetics Makeup Trainer.
Throughout his career, he has led education and artistry programs across EMEA markets, worked with global creative teams in New York and Paris, participated in Fashion Weeks, couture bridal shows, and VIP events, and trained thousands of makeup artists and beauty professionals worldwide.
Since 2025, Eliano has been the official representative and trainer for Tommy G, conducting brand education, professional makeup training, and masterclasses in Lebanon, supporting the brand's artistic and educational vision.
This masterclass in Cyprus reflects his international experience, luxury brand expertise, and passion for empowering artists through education, mastery, and confidence.

team.name: Senior Beauty Educator
team.bio: Supports students through practical application, face charts, kit guidance, and polished final assessments.
